message:
fix(runtime): Fix list truthiness for bool() and not operators

- boolBuiltinCall: Check for .items field on structs (ArrayListUnmanaged)
  before falling back to default truthy behavior
- toBool: Add .items field check and handle fixed arrays properly
- genUnaryOp: Use runtime.toBool for list/array types in not operator
  instead of direct negation which fails on non-bool types

Now bool([]) returns False, not [] returns True, and list variables
work correctly with truth testing.
